creator: dclarke@blastwave.org
text:
Poudriere reports that firefox-123.0_2,2.log fails to build due to :

===>   firefox-123.0_2,2 depends on package: libvpx>=1.14.0 - not found
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/firefox


etc etc 

Seems we need multimedia/libvpx revved up a little.
